questions.q: The Present Simple is used for:
The Past Simple is used for:
questions.exp: The correct use is: The past

questions.q: The Future tense (will) is used for:
questions.exp: The correct use is: The future

questions.q: "He ___ football yesterday."
"She ___ every day."
"I ___ go tomorrow."
The verb "to be" (am, is, are) is used for:
"They ___ happy."
"I ___ a student."
"Plural" means:
A noun is:
questions.exp: Definition: A name (person, place, or thing)

questions.q: A verb is:
An adjective is:
An adverb is:
opts: A word that describes a verb
questions.exp: Correct answer: A word that describes a verb

questions.q: "Quickly" is:
"Big" is:
A sentence is:
questions.exp: Definition: A complete group of words

questions.q: The subject is:
questions.exp: Correct answer: The doer of the action

questions.q: The object is:
questions.exp: Correct answer: The receiver of the action

questions.q: Punctuation means:
We ……………. the new manager yesterday morning.
Some people think that life in the past ……………. happier and healthier than today.
The athlete ……………. the gold medal last week.
In 1995, my uncle ……………. to Canada on a business trip.
As soon as the sun had set, the temperature ……..………………dramatically.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: had dropped

questions.q: We ……………. most of our electronic devices from Japan.
Some friends of mine like to drink coffee with …………….
I am on a diet. I will have ……………. espresso with skimmed milk.
Apple Corporation has a / an ……………. logo that makes it well known.
Would you prefer a/an ……………. or a cappuccino?
My mother has bought these beautiful flowers for their delicate …………….
If they had trained hard enough before the match, ……………………….. (Complete the sentence)
opts: If they had trained hard enough before the match, they would have won the match.
If they had trained hard enough before the match they win the match.
If they had trained hard enough before the match they will win the match.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: If they had trained hard enough before the match, they would have won the match.

questions.q: He would have been on time for the interview if he (leave)………………… (Complete the sentence)
opts: He would have been on time for the interview if he leaves the house at nine
He would have been on time for the interview if he has left the house at nine
He would have been on time for the interview if he had left the house at nine
questions.exp: The correct answer is: He would have been on time for the interview if he leaves the house at nine

questions.q: If my cousin (follow) …………….. a strict regime, she could have lost some weight. )Correct the verb)
opts: If my cousin followed a strict regime, she has lost some weight.
If my cousin had followed a strict regime, she could have lost some weight.
If my cousin follows a strict regime, she could have lost some weight.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: If my cousin followed a strict regime, she has lost some weight.

questions.q: If he hadn’t used the map and compass in the forest, …………………… (Complete the sentence)
opts: If he hadn’t used the map and compass in the forest, he would have been lost.
If he hadn’t used the map and compass in the forest, he lost
If he hadn’t used the map and compass in the forest, he will be lost
questions.exp: The correct answer is: If he hadn’t used the map and compass in the forest, he will be lost

questions.q: If he had saved a large amount of money, he ………………………… (Complete the sentence)
opts: If he had saved a large amount of money, he starts his own business
If he had saved a large amount of money, he would have started his own business
If he had saved a large amount of money, he will start his own business
questions.exp: The correct answer is: If he had saved a large amount of money, he starts his own business

questions.q: Jack has just……………. the window of the gym accidentally.
My mother ………...… just baked a cake for the picnic.
I have ………………..….… been to this lovely place before.
They have already……………………..…….. a new house.
What does the underlined word "incredible" in the 1st paragraph mean?
What does the underlined pronoun "them" in the 1st paragraph refer to?
According to the passage, all the following statements are TRUE EXCEPT:
opts: Octopuses have sharp claws to defend themselves.
Octopuses are extremely intelligent sea animals.
Octopuses are threatened by predators under the sea.
Octopuses use some tricks when they are in trouble.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: Octopuses have sharp claws to defend themselves.

questions.q: Improving trade between the two countries will be top of the ……………………. at the meeting.
My brother stopped to ……………………. around a sporting equipment store.
I can never do without my ……………………. to remind me of important events.
The tie will be a good ………………………. to this fine suit.
